name: TAE Technologies / Trump Media (TMTG) Merger
one_liner: First publicly traded pure-play fusion stock via merger

funding_raised.value: $200M cash at signing + $100M upon S-4 filing

technical_milestones.milestone: First-ever NBI-only FRC plasma formation (published Nature Communications)
Skipped 6th-gen Copernicus machine, proceeding directly to Da Vinci prototype
Stable plasma at >70 million degrees C
Reactor length/complexity reduced up to 50%
Truth Social spin-off into SpinCo via TVA merger announced
Begin constructing 50 MWe utility-scale plant

catalysts.event: Merger expected closing mid-2026 (StockTitan target May 1, 2026)
Truth Social spin-off creates pure-play fusion entity
S-4 filing triggers $100M additional cash
Da Vinci commercial prototype construction

risks.risk: Net energy gain NOT yet demonstrated
Trump-brand political entanglement and uncertainty
TTM net loss of -$712M
Beta of 4.54 — extreme volatility
~50% dilution to existing DJT holders from all-stock merger
No definitive agreement yet on Truth Social spin-off

toy_phase_dismissal.evidence: Fusion widely dismissed as 'always 30 years away'; political brand adds extra dismissal from serious investors

working_code.evidence: Nature Communications publication of NBI-only FRC plasma; skipped entire reactor generation; 70M+ degrees C plasma; 1,600+ patents

ideological_community.evidence: Fusion community exists but DJT stock attracts meme-stock/political traders, not ideological fusion believers

developer_activity.evidence: 1,600+ patents; Nature Communications publication; Da Vinci prototype design advancement

smart_money_entry.evidence: Google, Chevron, Goldman Sachs as TAE backers; $6B deal valuation

narrative_clarity.evidence: First publicly traded pure-play fusion stock — clear one-sentence narrative

hard_to_buy.evidence: Publicly traded on NASDAQ as DJT — very easy to buy

catalyst_proximity.evidence: Merger closing mid-2026 (May target); Truth Social spin-off creating pure-play; immediate event-driven setup
